project.name: Spyglass Core
project.description: The framework-neutral front end: the no-build Vue/ESM application, the pre-built CodeMirror editor bundle, and config.js — served from META-INF/resources/apidocs/ by any Spring web stack on classpath presence alone. Static assets only: no Java, no server code, no framework dependency. The one build that exists (the CodeMirror bundle, under frontend/) runs only when the editor dependencies change; its output is committed.
